seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: The email must include one hyperlink formatted as [text](URL).
new_constraint: Avoid including hyperlink in the email.
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. The email must include one hyperlink formatted as [text](URL). Avoid including hyperlink in the email.
response:
Subject: Approval of Your Vacation Request

Hi [Employee Name],

I'm writing to confirm that your request for vacation time from [Start Date] to [End Date] has been approved. We are glad to have you take some well-deserved time off to recharge.

Please ensure that all your current projects are up to date and that you have briefed the team on your pending tasks before you leave. You can find our updated team calendar and coverage guidelines here: [Team Calendar](https://example.com/calendar).

We look forward to seeing you back on [Return Date]. Enjoy your time away!

Best regards,

[Your Name]  
[Your Job Title]
